overview.description: Big Four professional services firm delivering audit, consulting, tax, risk, and AI & data services across Czech Republic and Slovakia.
overview.description_long: Deloitte is one of the world's largest professional services networks, present in the Czech Republic since 1993. The Czech & Slovak practice offers Audit & Assurance, Tax, Consulting, Risk Advisory, Financial Advisory, and Legal services across five Czech offices (Prague, Brno, Ostrava, Plzeň, Hradec Králové). Their dedicated Engineering, AI & Data practice delivers intelligent automation, generative AI, business intelligence, and cloud & engineering services. The Deloitte Central Europe AI Institute, led out of Prague, develops AI strategy, GenAI activation programs, and trustworthy AI frameworks for enterprise clients across industries including financial services, TMT, public sector, manufacturing, and consumer.

history.origin_story: Founded in London in 1845 by William Welch Deloitte, the firm expanded globally and entered the Czech Republic in 1993 following the post-Velvet Revolution transition to a market economy. The Czech & Slovak practice is part of Deloitte Central Europe, one of the largest professional services practices in the region.

key_milestones.event: Founded in London by William Welch Deloitte
Established Czech Republic practice post-Velvet Revolution
Acquired Monitor Group strategy consulting business globally
Launched Deloitte Central Europe AI Institute, led from Prague
Reported global revenue of US$70.5 billion (FY2025); GenAI Activation Lab launched in Czech Republic

leadership.name: Ivana Lorencovičová
leadership.role: Managing Partner, Deloitte Czech & Slovak Republic

leadership.name: Miroslav Svoboda
leadership.role: Country Leader Deloitte Czech Republic, Deloitte Private Leader

leadership.name: Jan Hejtmánek
leadership.role: Partner | Deloitte CE AI Institute Leader

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL. Deloitte website is heavily JavaScript-rendered; most sub-pages return 404 or empty HTML without JS execution. Key data extracted from JSON-LD schema on about page: 5 Czech offices confirmed (Prague, Brno, Ostrava, Plzeň, Hradec Králové). Employee count for Czech Republic estimated at 1,001-5,000 range based on Big Four scale and 5-office presence — Deloitte CZ typically quotes ~1,500-1,900 staff in public communications. Founded in Czech Republic ~1993. AI Institute Leader Jan Hejtmánek confirmed from services page. Glassdoor and LinkedIn blocked. Global revenue $70.5B (FY2025). Global employees ~460,000.
